label: default agent • disable an MCP server (disable action)
query: Disable the MCP server 4f2b7e91-8c03-4a65-9d17-5e0a2c8f6b34 for now.
notes: "Disable" maps directly to action 'disable' on the consolidated osaurus_mcp tool (a first-class action alongside enable, so the model never has to discover the 'enable' + enabled:false idiom — the eval matrix surfaced that older shape sending small models into a self-correction loop). Unknown id → typed not-found error. The selection assertion pins the 'disable' action, not the literal UUID (small models mis-transcribe 32-hex-digit ids).
